XSLT/xsl:key/use.name: use
XSLT/xsl:key/use.description: Specifies an XPath expression that will be used to determine the value of the key for each of the applicable nodes.

info.excerpt: Specifies an XPath expression that will be used to determine the value of the key for each of the applicable nodes.

XSLT/xsl:attribute-set/use-attribute-set.name: use-attribute-sets
XSLT/xsl:attribute-set/use-attribute-set.description: Builds an attribute set from other attribute sets. The names of the contributing sets must be separated with whitespace characters and must not directly or indirectly embed themselves.

info.excerpt: Builds an attribute set from other attribute sets. The names of the contributing sets must be separated with whitespace characters and must not directly or indirectly embed themselves.

XSLT/xsl:copy/use-attribute-sets.name: use-attribute-sets
XSLT/xsl:copy/use-attribute-sets.description: Lists attribute sets that should be applied to the output node, if it is an element. Names of the sets should be separated with whitespace characters.

info.excerpt: Lists attribute sets that should be applied to the output node, if it is an element. Names of the sets should be separated with whitespace characters.

XSLT/xsl:element/use-attribute-sets.name: use-attribute-sets
XSLT/xsl:element/use-attribute-sets.description: A whitespace‐separated list ofattribute-setelementnames to be applied to theelementelement's output element. Applied attributes can be overridden via nestedattributeelements.

info.excerpt: A whitespace‐separated list ofattribute-setelementnames to be applied to theelementelement's output element. Applied attributes can be overridden via nestedattributeelements.

XSLT/xsl:stylesheet/use-when.name: use-when
XSLT/xsl:stylesheet/use-when.description: Determines whether the element and all the nodes that have it as ancestor are excluded from the stylesheet.

info.excerpt: Determines whether the element and all the nodes that have it as ancestor are excluded from the stylesheet.
